title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 311.192 - Wine manufacturer defined
text:
311.192.  Wine manufacturer defined. — The term "wine manufacturer" as used in this chapter shall mean any person, partnership, association of persons, or corporation who has procured a license under subdivision (2) of subsection 1 of section 311.180 or section 311.190, and who manufactures in excess of two hundred gallons of wine per calendar year.
(L. 2009 H.B. 132)
